title: helianthemum × triregnorum
intro: Helianthemum × triregnorum, also known as Rockrose, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Cistaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it useful in treating various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Rockrose include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and fighting off infections, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and immune-modulating effects. Rockrose is traditionally used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to soothe skin irritations, calm digestive issues, and support immune function.
